title: changeset-builder inputs
description: Typed Gate-A input contract for the changeset-builder agent. Missing-required or under-constrained inputs trigger REFUSAL_INPUT_AMBIGUOUS.

package_name.description: Logical name for the package / changeset. Becomes the emitted folder name.

member.description: Fully qualified member name. '*' for all when permitted.

items.description: Array of component/metadata identifiers to include in the change set. Minimum 1 entries; each entry is a string like `ApexClass:AccountService`.

api_version.description: Salesforce API version written into generated `*-meta.xml` files. Must match pattern `^\d{2}\.0$` (e.g., `60.0`).

target_org_alias.description: sf CLI alias of the org used for Gate B live-org grounding (`describe_org`, `describe_sobject`, SOQL probes). Optional — when omitted, the builder runs in library-only mode and confidence is capped at MEDIUM.

repo_path.description: Repo-relative root of the caller's `force-app` source tree; the builder writes emitted artifacts underneath this path. Defaults to `./force-app`.
